message:
fix(storage,ops): harden test log capture locks against mutex poisoning

Replace .lock().expect() with .unwrap_or_else(|poisoned| poisoned.into_inner())
in test log-capture helpers across frankensearch-ops and frankensearch-storage
crates, with tracing::warn! diagnostics on poison recovery:

frankensearch-ops/src/storage.rs (3 sites):
- TestWriter::write() log buffer lock
- with_captured_logs() capture guard lock
- with_captured_logs() final buffer read lock

frankensearch-storage/src/pipeline.rs (2 sites):
- TestWriter::write() log buffer lock
- with_captured_logs() final buffer read lock

A poisoned mutex (from a thread panicking while holding the lock) should
not cascade into additional panics in test infrastructure since the
recovered state is still usable for log capture.

Close beads bd-30d2.22 (StoragePipeline VectorSink poison hardening) and
bd-30d2.24 (storage/ops test log capture poison hardening) with evidence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
